frame: Metals/energy assessed as (a) AI/datacenter/electrification demand signal and (b) macro-stress/safe-haven signal. Both confirmed: copper/uranium/power = physical AI buildout; gold/silver = monetary/debt stress. Complex peaked late-Jan 2026 and pulled back into spring 2026.

metrics.name: Copper COMEX HG front-month
metrics.yoy_or_move: +29.9% YoY; off record ~6.6/lb hit early June 2026; from ~3.80-4.00/lb early 2024
metrics.notes: AI-demand metal. -3.97% on the day.

metrics.name: Copper LME 3-month
metrics.yoy_or_move: spot ~13,000; recent range 12,900-13,200; 2024 record ref 11,771/t
metrics.notes: Secondary reporting; LME settlement files not pulled directly.

metrics.name: Copper refined supply deficit 2026 (forecast range)
metrics.yoy_or_move: flip from 2025 surplus to deficit
metrics.notes: ICSG ~150k; JPM ~330k; UBS >400k. Bank forecasts.

metrics.name: AI datacenter copper intensity
metrics.yoy_or_move: hyperscale AI facility up to ~50,000 t; ~1.1 Mt/yr by 2030 (~3% global demand)
metrics.notes: Conventional DC 5,000-15,000 t. Core AI-demand confirm.

metrics.name: Copper Section 232 tariff
metrics.yoy_or_move: COMEX-LME premium blew out to record ~2,520-2,600/t (~26%); COMEX +13% in a day to >12,445/t
metrics.notes: Front-running drove COMEX stocks to record 232,195 t (since 2004).

metrics.name: Gold spot
metrics.yoy_or_move: +30.78% YoY; from ~2,069 (Jan 1 2024); off all-time high 5,589 (Jan 28 2026)
metrics.notes: Macro-stress metal. -3.2% on day to 2026 low on hot US jobs print (172k vs 85k est). CNBC quoted ~4,413 at 9am ET.

metrics.name: Gold all-time high 2026
metrics.yoy_or_move: peak; ~2.1x vs early-2024 base
metrics.notes: Record then spring pullback.

metrics.name: Central bank gold purchases 2025
metrics.yoy_or_move: record; 3rd straight year >1,000 t; 2026 est ~755 t; pre-2022 norm ~400-500 t
metrics.notes: Cleanest macro-stress / de-dollarization signal.

metrics.name: PBoC gold holdings
metrics.yoy_or_move: 18th consecutive monthly addition
metrics.notes: Structural de-dollarization bid. WGC/Ray Jia.

metrics.name: Gold COMEX-LME EFP premium spike (2025 dislocation)
metrics.yoy_or_move: COMEX gold inventory 17.1 -> 43.3 Moz (Nov24->Mar25, +153%, record quarterly inflow)
metrics.notes: Tariff-fear driven; London 400oz bars recast in Switzerland to 100oz COMEX bars.

metrics.name: SHFE gold futures activity
metrics.yoy_or_move: volumes +17% MoM, ~72% above 5-yr avg
metrics.notes: Live June bp-premium not obtained.

metrics.name: Silver spot
metrics.yoy_or_move: +87.04% YoY; -8.86% on day; off all-time high 121.64 (Jan 29 2026); from ~23 (Jan 2024)
metrics.notes: Squeeze then unwind. Dual industrial/monetary signal.

metrics.name: Silver market squeeze metrics (Jan 2026)
metrics.yoy_or_move: >33 Moz withdrawn in one week (~26% of stock); 1-month lease rate ~8%
metrics.notes: Severe physical scarcity. 2026 deficit ~46.3 Moz (6th straight).

metrics.name: Platinum spot
metrics.yoy_or_move: +51.62% YoY; -6.45% on day; off late-Dec 2025 records (~2,446 reached)
metrics.notes: BofA 2026 forecast raised to 2,450 from 1,825.

metrics.name: Palladium spot
metrics.yoy_or_move: +17.97% YoY; -7.08% on day; off ~1,826 reached
metrics.notes: BofA 2026 forecast raised to 1,725 from 1,525. Russia/Norilsk supply risk + hybrid demand.

metrics.name: Uranium spot U3O8
metrics.yoy_or_move: +20.64% YoY; off 2026 high 101.41 (Jan 29, first >100 since 2007); from ~72 (early 2024)
metrics.notes: Nuclear-for-AI metal. Long-term contract price ~93/lb (highest since 2008).

metrics.name: Big Tech nuclear/SMR deals for AI datacenters
metrics.yoy_or_move: MSFT/Constellation TMI 837 MW by 2028; Google/Kairos 500 MW 6-7 SMRs; Amazon/X-energy; Oracle 3 SMRs; Oklo/Meta 1.2 GW Ohio
metrics.notes: Physical AI-power buildout evidence.

metrics.name: Global datacenter electricity demand 2026 (IEA)
metrics.yoy_or_move: from ~460 TWh (2022); AI-DC electricity to more than quadruple by 2030; US >250 TWh in 2026
metrics.notes: ~equal to Japan's total consumption. Big-tech capex >400B in 2025, +75% in 2026.

metrics.name: PJM capacity auction clearing price
metrics.yoy_or_move: from 28.92 (2024/25) = ~10x; hit cap 333.44; record 3rd auction running
metrics.notes: Cleanest AI-demand signal. DCs = 40% of cost & 63% of price rise; cleared 6,625 MW below reserve target.

metrics.name: PJM datacenter share of capacity costs
metrics.yoy_or_move: 63% of the price increase (~$9.3B); peak demand +32 GW 2024-2030, all but 2 GW from DCs
metrics.notes: Physical grid bottleneck for AI.

caveats: June 5 spot from TradingEconomics commodity pages (gold cross-checked vs CNBC). CME/COMEX and LME settlement files not pulled directly (JS-rendered/paywalled to curl).
LME 3M copper and COMEX-LME premium figures from secondary reporting (RecyclingToday, Fastmarkets, S&P).
Live June 2026 SHFE bp-premium not obtained; only Jan 2026 activity + qualitative WGC framing.
Some 2024 baselines (copper ~3.80-4.00, uranium ~72) are approximate round figures from secondary sources.
Forecast figures (JPM, BofA, UBS, Goldman, Deutsche, SocGen) are bank research opinions, not realized data.
